description_long: This is a heavily armored, four-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a prominent turret-mounted cannon. The vehicle features sloped armor plating across its body, providing enhanced ballistic protection, and a camouflage paint scheme in green, brown, and black tones. The turret is centrally located and equipped with a long-barreled main gun, as well as additional mounts for secondary armaments. The front of the vehicle is reinforced with a robust grille and angled panels, while the rear includes a spare tire and access hatches. Antennas and periscopes are visible on the roof, indicating advanced communication and observation capabilities. The tires are large, rugged, and designed for off-road mobility, with deep treads for traction.
description: A camouflaged, armored four-wheeled combat vehicle with a turret-mounted cannon, sloped armor, and rugged off-road tires. Features include a reinforced front grille, spare tire, and multiple roof-mounted antennas.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the spare tire, sloped rear armor, and the turret with its long cannon extending forward.
description_view_1: Front-side view highlighting the reinforced grille, angled armor panels, and the rugged off-road tires.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the prominent grille, sloped frontal armor, and the main cannon projecting from the turret.
description_view_3: Rear-side view focusing on the back armor, spare tire, and the turret's rear details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; possible secondary mounts on the turret sides.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating; reinforced front and side panels; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular patches of green, brown, and black in a disruptive style.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, rugged tread patterns; one visible spare tire mounted at the rear.
